original: We will submit the GearChange API spec on Friday.
We will migrate the database to PostgreSQL next week.
evidence: The database migration to PostgreSQL was completed and deployed on Tuesday.

original: We plan to add two-factor authentication next sprint.
Authentication will be switched to session cookies.
evidence: Session cookie authentication was shipped in release v2.3.0.

original: We are going to upgrade the CI from Jenkins to GitHub Actions.
evidence: CI migration to GitHub Actions was completed and all pipelines are green.

original: The team needs to write integration tests for the payment module.
We will replace Redis with Valkey for caching.
evidence: Valkey has been deployed as the new caching backend replacing Redis.

original: Documentation updates are planned for the next sprint.
We plan to upgrade Python from 3.9 to 3.12.
evidence: Python runtime was upgraded to 3.12 and all CI tests pass.

original: The search engine migration to OpenSearch should happen in Q3.
evidence: OpenSearch migration was completed in Q3 as planned.

original: We will add rate limiting at 60 req/min.
evidence: Rate limiting was implemented and deployed at 60 req/min.

original: The frontend rewrite in React 18 is planned for next quarter.
We need to implement the export feature for CSV.
The ORM will be migrated from SQLAlchemy to Prisma.
evidence: Prisma ORM migration was finished and the SQLAlchemy dependency removed.

original: Monitoring will be moved to Datadog.
evidence: Datadog monitoring is live and the Prometheus/Grafana stack was decommissioned.

original: We plan to add GraphQL support to the API.
The deployment will be migrated to Kubernetes.
evidence: Kubernetes migration was completed and Docker Swarm clusters shut down.

original: We need to add dark mode to the dashboard.
Storage will be migrated from S3 to GCS.
evidence: GCS migration completed; all buckets are now in Google Cloud Storage.

original: We plan to add webhook support for event notifications.
The embedding model will be upgraded to BGE-M3.
evidence: BGE-M3 is now the default embedding model after benchmark validation.

original: We should add a health check endpoint.
Message broker will be replaced with Kafka.
evidence: Kafka is now live as the message broker replacing RabbitMQ.

original: The team plans to refactor the authentication module.
We will add audit logging for all admin actions.
evidence: Audit logging for admin actions was implemented and shipped.

original: The API documentation needs to be updated.
We plan to implement caching for search results.
evidence: Search result caching was implemented using Valkey with 5-minute TTL.

original: The mobile app will support offline mode.
We will add multi-tenant support to the platform.
evidence: Multi-tenant isolation was implemented and tested across all tenants.

original: The team needs to improve test coverage for the API layer.
We plan to enable vector search for semantic retrieval.
evidence: Vector search is enabled and integrated into the retrieval pipeline.

original: The SSO integration is planned for next quarter.
